sa:items.rdfs:label: Abundant ammunition
sa:items.spell:description: Touched weapon creates ammunition magically with each shot.
sa:items.sa:effect: The targeted weapon generates ammunition (arrows, bullets, bolts, etc.) on each attack, eliminating the need to carry or retrieve projectiles. Fired ammunition vanishes after use or if the spell ends.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Affliction
sa:items.spell:description: Damage dealt to one target echoes as psychic torment in another's mind.
sa:items.sa:effect: When one target within range takes damage, the other target that can hear you must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, it takes psychic damage equal to the damage the first creature sustained (up to 1d6 per caster level). The affliction persists for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Animate dead
sa:items.spell:description: Raise corpses as skeletal servants under your command.
sa:items.sa:effect: Each corpse within 50 feet becomes a skeleton under your telepathic control. Skeletons remain animated indefinitely unless destroyed. They are not sentient and possess no agency beyond following commands. You can animate up to five corpses per hour spent on the ritual.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Anticipate peril
sa:items.spell:description: Gain preternatural reflexes and dodge danger with uncanny precision.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 minute / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You gain advantage on initiative rolls, Dexterity saving throws, and stealth checks. As a reaction, you can move up to half your movement speed without provoking opportunity attacks. You cannot be surprised for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Arc
sa:items.spell:description: Lightning chains between creatures in a cascading arc of destruction.
sa:items.spell:target: 1 creature and up to 2 additional. All targets must be within 15ft of one of the others
sa:items.sa:effect: You target up to 3 creatures within range, each within 15 feet of at least one other target. Each target takes 3d6 lightning damage as the arc strikes them all simultaneously.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Armor of the damned
sa:items.spell:description: Shadows form a protective shroud around your form.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 5 rounds + proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You gain 10 temporary hit points. Ranged attack rolls against you have disadvantage as shadows obscure your exact position. The armor persists until you lose the temporary hit points or concentration ends.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Armor of the faithful
sa:items.spell:description: Holy radiance forms a protective barrier against dark forces.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 5 rounds + proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You gain 10 temporary hit points and gain resistance to radiant and necrotic damage. The barrier persists for the duration or until temporary hit points are lost.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Army of the dead
sa:items.spell:description: Raise a vast army of skeletal servants across a wide area.
sa:items.sa:effect: All corpses within 1 mile of you rise as skeletons under your telepathic command. They remain animated indefinitely and obey all orders. The ritual requires one uninterrupted hour and can be cast only once per day.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Attuned to the universe
sa:items.spell:description: Perfect cosmic alignment grants supernatural foresight and mobility.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 10 minute / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You treat all initiative rolls as if you rolled a 20. As a reaction, you can move up to half your movement speed without triggering opportunity attacks, and you can move through area effects. You cannot be surprised.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bane
sa:items.spell:description: Curse enemies within range with weakness and misfortune.
sa:items.spell:target: Hostile creatures within a 50ft burst from the caster
sa:items.sa:effect: Hostile creatures within a 50-foot radius burst must make a Wisdom save or suffer disadvantage on all attack rolls and saving throws. A successful save negates the effect for that creature.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Barrier
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure a whirling vortex of razor-sharp winds that devastates.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: A 30-foot line of whirling wind appears within range. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save or take 10d10 slashing damage. The area becomes difficult terrain. The barrier persists for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bind elements
sa:items.spell:description: Infuse a weapon with primal elemental power.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a weapon and channel elemental power into it. Choose one element (fire, cold, lightning, acid, poison, or radiant). Attacks with this weapon deal an additional 1d6 damage of the chosen type for 24 hours.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Black tentacles
sa:items.spell:description: Writhing tentacles of living shadow emerge and restrain all they touch.
sa:items.sa:effect: A 20-foot square of writhing tentacles appears within range, becoming difficult terrain. Creatures starting their turn in the area take 5d6 necrotic damage and must make a Dexterity save or become grappled. Grappled creatures can use an action to escape with a Strength check.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Blade ward
sa:items.spell:description: Magical force deflects weapons and blades from your form.
sa:items.sa:effect: A shimmering forcefield surrounds you, granting resistance to piercing, slashing, and bludgeoning damage for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Bless
sa:items.spell:description: Grant allies divine favor to enhance their actions.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 minute / proficiency bonus
sa:items.spell:target: Caster and allies within 50 ft burst from caster.
sa:items.sa:effect: You and all willing allies within 50 feet that you designate gain a +1d4 bonus on attack rolls and saving throws. The blessing persists for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Blur
sa:items.spell:description: Your form shifts and blurs, confusing attacks aimed at you.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: Your form shimmers and becomes indistinct. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage. The effect persists until you dismiss it or concentration ends.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Burglar's buddy
sa:items.spell:description: Disable surveillance and security systems within your aura.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 10 minutes / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: Mechanical, optical, and electrical alarms within 25 feet automatically fail to trigger. You become invisible to all cameras and electronic surveillance in this range. The effect ends if you move beyond range or concentration breaks.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Burning hands
sa:items.spell:description: Ignite a cone of searing flame that consumes all it touches.
sa:items.spell:target: Creatures in a 15-foot cone from you
sa:items.sa:effect: A sheet of flame erupts from your hands in a 15-foot cone. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Charm person
sa:items.spell:description: Magically beguile a humanoid into treating you as a trusted friend.
sa:items.sa:effect: One humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become charmed by you for the duration. While charmed, the target regards you as a friendly acquaintance and will not willingly harm you or your allies.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Chromatic Orb
sa:items.spell:description: Hurl a sphere of elemental energy that adapts to your chosen element.
sa:items.sa:effect: You hurl a 4-inch sphere of energy at a target you can see within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 3d8 damage of an element you choose (fire, cold, lightning, acid, poison, or radiant). For each additional spellpoint spent, increase damage by 1d8.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Conjure spellfighter
sa:items.spell:description: Summon an ultralight spacecraft to appear nearby.
sa:items.sa:effect: You conjure a small, ultralight spacecraft within 100 feet in an open space that can accommodate it. If no suitable space exists, the ritual fails. The vessel remains for 1 day or until dismissed.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Counterspell
sa:items.spell:description: Interrupt an enemy's spellcasting with a surge of magical force.
sa:items.sa:effect: You attempt to interrupt a creature's spellcasting. If you spend spellpoints equal to or greater than the spell level being cast, you automatically succeed. Otherwise, make an Intelligence check with DC 10 + spell level. On a success, the spell is interrupted. On a failure, casting continues normally.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Create undeath
sa:items.spell:description: Create a powerful undead servant from corpses.
sa:items.spell:target: 1 corpse in Touch range per 1 hour of the ritual
sa:items.sa:effect: A corpse within 50 feet rises as a wight, spectre, or ghoul under your control. This ritual requires one uninterrupted hour and can be cast once per day.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Create water
sa:items.spell:description: Manifest fresh water at a location of your choice.
sa:items.spell:duration: Until drunk, then it stays in the drinker as normal, else 1 day
sa:items.sa:effect: Water condenses in the air at a point you choose, falling like rain or filling a container such as a bucket or a skin.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Crown of madness
sa:items.spell:description: Drive a humanoid into a violent frenzy, compelled to attack the nearest creature.
sa:items.sa:effect: One humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed and driven into a rage. While charmed this way, a twisted iron crown appears on its head, and it compulsively attacks the nearest creature each turn.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Culling
sa:items.spell:description: Drain life energies from surrounding creatures while healing yourself.
sa:items.sa:effect: Creatures in a 20-foot radius take 4d6 necrotic damage and make a Constitution save to halve. Creatures with wound damage automatically fail. When a target dies, you heal 1d8 HP; if at max, gain 15 temporary HP instead.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Damned
sa:items.spell:description: Sacrifice your integrity to wound a target through direct necrotic force.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature and channel necrotic energy through your body, dealing 4d8 necrotic damage. You take 1 sanity damage as payment for this sacrifice.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Darkness
sa:items.spell:description: Create a zone of supernatural darkness that obscures vision.
sa:items.sa:effect: An area of supernatural darkness radiates from the target, forming a 20-foot radius sphere, 10 feet tall. Creatures in the area have disadvantage on Perception checks and cannot see beyond 10 feet.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Detect magic
sa:items.spell:description: Sense the presence of magic and identify its school of origin.
sa:items.sa:effect: You sense magic within 30 feet. As an action, you can see magical auras around creatures and objects. You learn the school of magic but not the specific spell. Creatures hidden from divination cannot be sensed.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Dimension door
sa:items.spell:description: Step through reality to teleport vast distances instantly.
sa:items.spell:target: One 5 ft square you can see within 500ft
sa:items.sa:effect: You take a single step, instantly moving up to 500 feet to an unoccupied space you can see. You can move through creatures and obstacles if your destination is within range.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Disguise Self
sa:items.spell:description: You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends or until you use your action to dismiss it. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear thin, fat, or in between. You can’t change your body type, so you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.
sa:items.sa:effect: You change your appearance, including clothing, armor, and weapons. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller, appear thin or fat, or change apparent age. You cannot change body type, so the form must have the same limb arrangement.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Displacement
sa:items.spell:description: Project a ghostly double to confuse attackers.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 round per proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You project a shimmering image of yourself. Attack rolls against you have disadvantage as attackers strike at illusions.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Eldricht blade
sa:items.spell:description: Wrap a weapon in crackling eldritch energy.
sa:items.sa:effect: A weapon you wield becomes wreathed in crackling energy. You gain advantage on attack rolls against creatures affected by a debuff you cast. When your proficiency bonus is odd, attacks deal an extra 1d6 force damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Eldricht portal
sa:items.spell:description: Open a gateway linking two distant locations.
sa:items.sa:effect: You open a shimmering 5-foot-diameter portal connecting two locations you know or can see via scrying, sensors, or video. Creatures and objects can pass freely. You can dismiss it as a bonus action.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Touch
sa:items.spell:description: Channel stellar radiance into a touch attack.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature and channel searing stellar power through your fingertips, dealing radiant damage based on your spellcasting ability.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ethereal blades
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure weapon replicas that sweep in a devastating cone.
sa:items.sa:damage: As if hit by your weapon + 1d8 per spellpoint spent
sa:items.sa:effect: Ethereal copies of your melee weapon sweep through a 15-foot cone. Make a melee spell attack against each creature in the area. On a hit, a target takes weapon damage plus 1d8 force per additional spellpoint spent.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Faerie fire
sa:items.spell:description: Cause a creature to glow with colored light.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you can see within range is outlined in colored magical light. Attack rolls against it have advantage; it cannot benefit from invisibility.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Favoured
sa:items.spell:description: Infuse your attacks with divine favor.
sa:items.sa:effect: Your melee weapon attacks are infused with magical power, gaining advantage on attack rolls and dealing additional force damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Feather fall
sa:items.spell:description: Turn a deadly fall into a gentle descent.
sa:items.sa:effect: You slow one falling creature's descent to 60 feet per round, preventing fall damage. The effect lasts for the duration or until the creature lands.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Fireball
sa:items.spell:description: Ignite a massive explosion of flame at a target location.
sa:items.sa:effect: A fiery globe streaks from your hand and explodes at a target point within range, filling a 30-foot radius sphere. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save or take fire damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firebolt
sa:items.spell:description: Hurl a burning projectile at a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: You hurl a mote of flame at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firelance
sa:items.spell:description: Project a line of fire from your hands.
sa:items.sa:effect: A 20-foot line of roaring flame extends from you. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save or take fire damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Firestorm
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure a raging inferno that consumes all in the area.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 1 round / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You call forth an inferno at a point within range. Each creature in a 40-foot radius must make a Dexterity save or take fire damage, reducing to ash.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Floating disk
sa:items.spell:description: Create a magical disc that hovers and carries cargo.
sa:items.sa:effect: A magical disc appears in an unoccupied space within range. It is weightless and can carry up to 500 pounds. It moves 30 feet per round at your command.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Fly
sa:items.spell:description: Grant a creature the ability to fly.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 1 minute per proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: Ethereal wings sprout from the target's shoulders, granting it a flying speed equal to its walking speed.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Frozen armor
sa:items.spell:description: Coat yourself in a layer of protective frost.
sa:items.sa:effect: Spectral frost covers your body, granting resistance to fire damage and penalty to melee attack rolls by enemies in close proximity.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Frozen blast
sa:items.spell:description: Freeze the target and surrounding air with a pulse of absolute cold.
sa:items.sa:effect: You target a creature with a wave of numbing cold. It must make a Constitution save or take cold damage and have its speed reduced by half until the end of its next turn.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Grease
sa:items.spell:description: Slick grease covers the ground, making movement treacherous.
sa:items.sa:effect: Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square. The area becomes difficult terrain. Creatures must succeed on an Acrobatics check to move through without falling prone.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Guiding bolt
sa:items.spell:description: Strike a target with radiant light and mark it for your allies.
sa:items.sa:effect: You hurl a flash of radiant light at a target. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 radiant damage, and the next attack roll against it before your next turn is made with advantage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Healing word
sa:items.spell:description: Speak words of healing to mend a creature's wounds.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you can see within range regains hit points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier plus the spell level.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Heartsqueeze
sa:items.spell:description: Form a claw as necrotic energy gathers to stop a target's heart.
sa:items.sa:effect: You force a creature you can see within range to make a Constitution save or take massive necrotic damage as its heart seizes. A creature reduced to 0 hit points this way dies.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Hex
sa:items.spell:description: Damage or disable a mechanical device.
sa:items.sa:effect: You target a mechanical or electrical device within range. It must make a saving throw or take damage, becoming unable to function until repaired.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Holy bolt
sa:items.spell:description: Launch a glowing radiant missile at a creature.
sa:items.sa:effect: You hurl a bolt of holy light at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 radiant damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: IM-Teleport
sa:items.spell:description: Teleport to a contact you're messaging through an instant messaging service.
sa:items.spell:target: Self and up to your proficiency bonus additional creatures
sa:items.sa:effect: You and willing creatures adjacent to you teleport to the location of a creature you are chatting with via instant messaging. You arrive in an unoccupied space near them.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ice storm
sa:items.spell:description: Call down a shattering hail of rock-hard ice in a wide area.
sa:items.sa:effect: A hail of rock-hard ice pounds down in a 20-foot radius, 40-foot tall cylinder centered on a point you can see. Creatures in the area must make a Dexterity save or take 4d6 cold damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Identify
sa:items.spell:description: Learn the magical properties of an object or creature.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch an object or creature and learn whether it bears a curse, magical effect, or enchantment. If it is magical, you learn school and general function without detailed mechanics.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Incinerate
sa:items.spell:description: Ignite a target in consuming flame.
sa:items.sa:effect: A target you can see must make a Dexterity save or catch fire, taking 3d6 fire damage immediately. It takes additional damage each round while burning. Submersion in water or other extinguishing action ends the fire.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Infernal cloak
sa:items.spell:description: Protect targets from radiant damage and burning light.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you touch gains resistance to radiant damage and cannot be blinded by bright light for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Inflict wounds
sa:items.spell:description: Tear open wounds on a touched target with necrotic power.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature and channel necrotic energy. It must make a Constitution save or take 3d6 necrotic damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Light
sa:items.spell:description: Cause an object to shine with bright magical light.
sa:items.spell:duration: 1 hour or until you cast this spell again
sa:items.sa:effect: A touched object shines with bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light 40 feet beyond, for the duration. The light is a color you choose.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Lightning Touch
sa:items.spell:description: Channel electrical energy through a melee touch attack.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature with electrical power. It must make a Dexterity save or take 2d6 lightning damage and be stunned until the end of its next turn.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mageblade
sa:items.spell:description: Manifest a sword of shimmering magical energy in your hand.
sa:items.sa:effect: A blade of magical force materializes in your hand, granting a weapon that deals 1d8 force damage on hit.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Magic ID
sa:items.spell:description: Create a magically authentic-looking false identification card.
sa:items.spell:target: A piece of paper or plastic roughly the size of the ID you want to replicate
sa:items.sa:effect: You enchant a blank card or paper to become an exact replica of a real ID card. Magical detection reveals the enchantment, but casual inspection shows perfect authenticity.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Magic missile
sa:items.spell:description: Hurl streaks of magical force that unerringly strike targets.
sa:items.sa:effect: You create three force missiles that dart toward targets you designate within range. Each missile hits a creature of your choice that you can see, dealing 1d4 force damage. Extra missiles created through spellpoint scaling.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Malediction
sa:items.spell:description: Place a curse on a creature that boosts damage against it.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you can see within range becomes cursed. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage whenever you hit the cursed target with an attack.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Meat receptacle
sa:items.spell:description: Transfer your soul into a corpse or living creature you touch.
sa:items.sa:effect: You transfer your consciousness into a corpse or living creature you touch. Your original body falls lifeless while you assume control of the new vessel. You retain your personality, memories, and intellect but gain the new body's physical traits and Hit Point maximum. A living creature can make a Charisma save to resist.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Meteor
sa:items.spell:description: Call down a devastating meteor strike on a distant location.
sa:items.sa:effect: A meteor streaks down from the sky to strike a point you can see within range. Each creature in a 200-foot-radius burst must make a Dexterity save or take bludgeoning damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mind blast
sa:items.spell:description: Subject an enemy to terrifying psychic visions.
sa:items.sa:effect: A target you can see must make an Intelligence save or take psychic damage as terrifying visions flood its mind.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mind sear
sa:items.spell:description: Reveal your patron's overwhelming magnificence to terrify a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you can see must make a Wisdom save. On a failure, it takes 2d6 psychic damage and becomes frightened until the end of its next turn. On a success, it takes half damage and isn't frightened.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Patron's caress
sa:items.spell:description: Touch a target to grant a glimpse of your patron's mind.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you touch gains advantage on its next saving throw before the end of its next turn, blessed by the touch of your patron.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Patron aspect
sa:items.spell:description: Bask in your patron's glory to be remade in its image.
sa:items.sa:effect: You undergo a ritual transformation into an aspect of your patron's form, gaining extraordinary abilities and appearance for a duration determined by the patron.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Phantom steed
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure a ghostly horse that responds to your commands.
sa:items.sa:effect: A phantasmal horse appears in an adjacent space under your control. It has AC 13, 15 HP, 60 ft movement, and can carry one Medium or two Small creatures. It cannot attack but can move, disengage, or help. It vanishes when reduced to 0 HP and cannot be summoned again until you finish a long rest.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Phase blade
sa:items.spell:description: Teleport your weapon's edge to extend its reach through space.
sa:items.sa:effect: You use teleportation magic to extend your melee weapon's cutting edge. Your next weapon attack has advantage and reaches 10 feet further than normal.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Premonition
sa:items.spell:description: See a glimpse of your own death, gaining certainty in the moment.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration up to 2 rounds / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: You gain visions of your own death, removing doubt and granting advantage on saving throws and attack rolls for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Protection from bullets
sa:items.spell:description: Shield yourself from projectile weapon attacks.
sa:items.spell:duration: Concentration, up to 10 minutes / proficiency bonus
sa:items.sa:effect: For the duration, you gain resistance to damage from projectile weapons like bullets, arrows, and bolts.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Puppeteer
sa:items.spell:description: Take control of a creature's body to move and act at your will.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature and psychically dominate it. The target makes a Charisma save or you control its actions for the duration. It cannot take actions or reactions of its own.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Raise dead
sa:items.spell:description: Return a willing dead creature to life.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a corpse of a creature that has been dead for no more than 10 days. The creature returns to life with 1 hit point. It returns with all its hit points if the body has not been damaged.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Ray of sickness
sa:items.spell:description: Unleash a ray of sickening energy that poisons a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: A greenish ray of sickening energy lashes from your hand at a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes poison damage and must make a Constitution save or be poisoned until the end of its next turn.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Recharge
sa:items.spell:description: Infuse magical or physical energy into a creature or device to restore power.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature or magical object and channel energy into it. A living creature regains hit points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier. A device or magical object regains a depleted use or charge.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Refresh vitality
sa:items.spell:description: Mend a target's wounds with healing energy.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you touch regains 1d8 hit points.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Resistance
sa:items.spell:description: Grant targets protection from elemental damage.
sa:items.sa:effect: Touched creatures gain resistance to a damage type of your choice (fire, cold, lightning, acid, or thunder) for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Restoration
sa:items.spell:description: Remove curses, poisons, and conditions from a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch a creature and cure one curse, disease, or poison affecting it. You may also remove one condition such as blindness, deafness, or paralysis.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sacred flame
sa:items.spell:description: Bring divine fire down on a foe from above.
sa:items.sa:effect: Radiant flames descend on a creature you can see within range. It must make a Dexterity save or take radiant damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sacred shield
sa:items.spell:description: Channel holy power into a shield to enhance its protection.
sa:items.sa:effect: A shield you wield becomes imbued with holy power, gaining a +2 bonus to AC and providing protection against necrotic damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sanctified
sa:items.spell:description: Grant targets protection from necrotic damage.
sa:items.sa:effect: Touched creatures gain resistance to necrotic damage for the duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sanctuary
sa:items.spell:description: Shroud yourself in protective magic that discourages attacks.
sa:items.sa:effect: You shroud yourself in magic energies. Creatures attacking you must make a Wisdom save or choose to attack another target instead.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shield
sa:items.spell:castingtime: Reaction, which you take when hit by an attack or targeted by magic missile
sa:items.spell:description: Raise a magical shield to protect against incoming attacks.
sa:items.sa:effect: You gain a +5 bonus to your AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack. If the triggering attack is from magic missile, the shield blocks up to five of the missiles.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shield other
sa:items.spell:description: Link yourself to a willing creature to share damage taken.
sa:items.sa:effect: You link yourself to a willing creature you touch. Whenever that creature takes damage, half the damage (rounded up) is redirected to you instead of the creature.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Shutdown
sa:items.spell:description: Send a pulse of energy that disables electronics and machinery in a wide area.
sa:items.sa:effect: You send a pulse of magical energy overloading all electronics in a 20-foot burst centered on a point you can see. Creatures using devices in the area must make an Intelligence save or their device is disabled until the end of their next turn. Magical devices are unaffected.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Starfall
sa:items.spell:description: Summon falling stars to strike multiple targets.
sa:items.sa:effect: You summon falling stars to strike up to five separate 5-foot squares you can see within range. Each creature in the targeted squares makes a Dexterity save or takes radiant damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Steelsense
sa:items.spell:description: Sense the presence of nearby metal objects through walls and obstacles.
sa:items.sa:effect: You extend your senses to feel metallic objects within 60 feet. You detect the presence, location, and rough sizes of weapons, armor, metal traps, and similar objects.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Summon
sa:items.spell:description: Call otherworldly beings into existence through ritual magic.
sa:items.sa:effect: Through a ritual, you draw primal otherworldly energies and give them form, summoning one or more otherworldly beings to serve you for the spell's duration.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thaumaturgy
sa:items.spell:description: Produce a minor supernatural effect that creates awe or wonder.
sa:items.sa:effect: You produce a minor supernatural effect: cause tremors in a 5-foot radius, amplify your voice to 300 feet, create flickering light or ethereal sounds, or manifest glowing patterns. The effect lasts up to 1 minute and creates no lasting damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thunder blast
sa:items.spell:description: Hurl a lance of thunder that pushes a target away.
sa:items.sa:effect: You hurl a lance of thunder at a creature you can see. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes thunder damage and makes a Constitution save or is pushed 5 feet away.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Thunderus slam
sa:items.spell:description: Create an explosive shockwave of thunder around yourself.
sa:items.sa:effect: You create a shockwave of thunder centered on yourself. Each creature within 15 feet must make a Dexterity save or take thunder damage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Tools of the blessed
sa:items.spell:description: Bless a firearm with divine or profane power for the next shot.
sa:items.sa:effect: You bless a firearm you're holding with righteous fire or dark smoke. Your next single attack roll with that firearm before the end of your turn gains advantage. This does not apply to burst or automatic fire.

sa:items.rdfs:label: True strike
sa:items.spell:description: Gain perfect insight into the moment to strike a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: You sense the perfect moment to strike a target you can see. Your next attack roll against that target before the spell ends is made with advantage.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Unwilling shield
sa:items.spell:description: Force a creature to stand between you and incoming harm.
sa:items.sa:effect: A creature you can see must make a Charisma save or be magically compelled to position itself to take damage meant for you. Until the spell ends, it gains no benefit from cover against attacks targeting you.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Wirewalk
sa:items.spell:description: Teleport along an electrical wire or conduit from one end to another.
sa:items.sa:effect: You touch an electrical wire, conduit, or similar conductor and instantly teleport to any other point on the same wire or connected system within 1 mile.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Witch arch
sa:items.spell:description: Form a sustained arc of lightning between you and a target.
sa:items.sa:effect: A beam of crackling blue energy lances out forming a sustained arc between you and a target you can see. At the start of each turn while concentrating, the target takes lightning damage. The arc ends if you or the target moves beyond range.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Wrecking orb
sa:items.spell:description: Conjure a sphere of devastating force that destroys everything near it.
sa:items.sa:effect: You conjure a sphere of destructive force near you. Creatures of your choice within 15 feet must make a Dexterity save or take force damage.
